summary: Iteration 110: Testing storyboard refactor - individual frame generation instead of grid splitting. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). All code structure verifications passed. The grid-splitting code (_split_grid_into_frames) was successfully REMOVED and replaced with individual frame generation functions (_generate_single_frame, _generate_all_frames_for_scene). Startup cleanup function exists and is called on app startup. Frontend toolbar is outside image overlay with VoiceInput properly sized.
critical_code_review_comments: storyboard.py line 30-131: _generate_single_frame function correctly generates individual frames via Gemini Nano Banana
storyboard.py line 154-193: _generate_all_frames_for_scene generates 6 frames in parallel (3 at a time) using threading
storyboard.py line 20-27: FRAME_TYPES has 6 entries: Plano Geral, Close-up, Acao, Reacao, Angulo Dramatico, Transicao
storyboard.py line 250: generate_all_panels calls _generate_all_frames_for_scene (NOT grid splitting)
studio.py line 133-160: _cleanup_stale_storyboards resets 'starting'/'generating' statuses on startup
server.py line 31-38: cleanup_stale_tasks startup event calls _cleanup_stale_storyboards
StoryboardEditor.jsx line 468-493: Toolbar with expand/inpaint/regen buttons is OUTSIDE image overlay (in separate div with bg-[#0D0D0D] border-t)
StoryboardEditor.jsx line 554-558: VoiceInput in inpainting section has size={14} and className='h-7 w-7'
VERIFIED: _split_grid_into_frames function was REMOVED from storyboard.py (grid splitting code gone)
seed_data_creation: Used existing project fce897cf6ba3 with 20 storyboard panels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 110 verified the storyboard refactor: 1) Grid-splitting code (_split_grid_into_frames) was REMOVED, 2) Individual frame generation functions exist (_generate_single_frame, _generate_all_frames_for_scene), 3) FRAME_TYPES has 6 entries with Portuguese labels, 4) Startup cleanup function resets stale 'starting'/'generating' statuses, 5) Frontend toolbar is outside image overlay (always visible, not hover-based), 6) VoiceInput has proper size (h-7 w-7, size={14}). The Studio is accessed via /marketing/studio route after clicking 'Create with AI Studio' button on Marketing page.
